zh.lifeSummary: 當Nuño Pérez de Lara於1118年出生在西班牙卡斯利亞-拉 曼哈托萊多時，他的父親Pedro Gonçalvez de Lara36歲，母親Condesa Ava Pérez de Traba44歲。他和Teresa Fernández de Traba至少有3個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於1177年8月3日在西班牙卡斯利亞-拉 曼哈昆卡昆卡享年59歲，埋葬在西班牙卡斯利亞 Y 利安帕倫希亞比拉萊斯。

nameMeanings.name: Pérez
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Juan, Manuel, Carlos, Luis, Jesus, Francisco, Pedro, Miguel, Jorge, Ramon, Rafael, Mario.
Spanish (Pérez): patronymic from the personal name Pedro, an equivalent of Peter . This surname is also found in France. Compare De Perez .

variants.name: Parez
meanings: Hispanic: altered form of Spanish Pérez (see Perez ).
In some cases possibly also French (Nord), Walloon, and Flemish: variant of Paré (see Pare ) or Paret .

variants.name: Peter
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Hans, Kurt, Otto, Ernst, Fritz, Heinz, Helmut, Horst, Kaspar, Klaus, Siegfried, Wolfgang.

English, Scottish, German, Dutch, French (Alsace and Lorraine), Czech (Moravian), Slovak, Croatian, and Slovenian; Hungarian (Péter): from the personal name Peter (Greek Petros, from petra ‘rock’). The personal name was popular throughout Christian Europe in the Middle Ages, having been bestowed by Christ as a byname on the apostle Simon bar Jonah, the brother of Andrew. The name was chosen by Christ for its symbolic significance (John 1:42, Matt. 16:18); Saint Peter is regarded as the founding head of the Christian Church in view of Christ's saying, ‘Thou art Peter and upon this rock I will build my Church’. In Christian Germany in the early Middle Ages this was the most frequent personal name of non-ancient Germanic origin until the 14th century. In North America, this surname has also absorbed cognates from other languages, for example Czech Petr , Polish Piotr and Pietr, Albanian Pjetri (from the personal name Pjetër, definite form Pjetri), and also their derivatives (see examples at Peterson ). It has also been adopted as a surname by Ashkenazic Jews.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lara
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Manuel, Francisco, Carlos, Jorge, Luis, Pedro, Jesus, Roberto, Rafael, Mario.
Spanish: habitational name from a place called Lara de los Infantes in Burgos province. Compare   De Lara  .

variants.name: De Lara
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Carlos, Juan, Jose, Luis, Mauricio, Pedro, Alfonso, Ana, Jaime, Javier, Jorge, Merlinda.
Spanish: variant, with the preposition de ‘from’, of Lara .

nameMeanings.name: Nuño
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized form of the Irish name Úna , assimilated to the name of the Roman goddess Juno, consort of Jupiter.

en.lifeSummary: When Nuño Pérez de Lara was born in 1118, in Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Spain, his father, Pedro Gonçalvez de Lara, was 36 and his mother, Condesa Ava Pérez de Traba, was 44. He had at least 3 sons and 3 daughters with Teresa Fernández de Traba. He died on 3 August 1177, in Cuenca, Cuenca, Castilla-La Mancha, Spain, at the age of 59, and was buried in Perales, Palencia, Castilla y León, Spain.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nuño Pérez de Lara est né en 1118, à Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Espagne, son père, Pedro Gonçalvez de Lara, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Condesa Ava Pérez de Traba, avait 44 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles avec Teresa Fernández de Traba. Il est décédé le 3 août 1177, à Cuenca, Cuenca, Castilla-La Mancha, Espagne, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterré à Perales, Palencia, Castilla y León, Espagne.

Er hatte mit Teresa Fernández de Traba mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 3. August 1177 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Cuenca, Cuenca, Castilla-La Mancha, Spanien und wurde in Perales, Palencia, Castilla y León, Spanien begraben.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nuño Pérez de Lara родился в 1118 г. в местности толедо, кастилла-ла манча, Испания, его отцу по имени Pedro Gonçalvez de Lara было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Condesa Ava Pérez de Traba, 44. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери от Teresa Fernández de Traba. Он умер 3 августа 1177 г. в местности куенка, куенка, кастилла-ла манча, Испания в возрасте 59 лет и был похоронен в местности пиреилесь, пеиленся, кастилла и леoн, Испания.
